content: flutter_rust_bridge 2.x: pub package and cargo binary must share identical version (e.g., 2.7.0). Codegen via 'flutter_rust_bridge_codegen generate'. Rust crate-type must be cdylib. frb annotates public fns with #[flutter_rust_bridge::frb]. async fns run on frb thread pool. StreamSink<T> for progress streaming. Generated files (frb_generated.dart, frb_generated.rs) are checked into git. Workspace: frb crate lives in gui/rust as a separate Cargo workspace that path-deps the main lib crate.
